title: The Neural Maze
auditIssues: [warning] Qin Feng repairs the fusion core with 'minimal energy' despite being at 'critically low' Qi reserves. The text states he's 'running on spiritual fumes' but then performs precise energy work that requires 'surgeon's touch' precision.

[warning] Qin Feng demonstrates sophisticated understanding of mech systems (recognizing fusion core as 'heart', hydraulics as 'muscles') very quickly for someone with 'zero knowledge of galactic society' and 'no experience with mech piloting'.
[info] AI-tell word 'seemed' appears once in ~2800 words, which is acceptable density.
[info] The chapter builds toward the midnight fight but doesn't deliver the combat payoff, ending on anticipation. This creates tension but may frustrate readers expecting resolution.
